internal_issues.description: VERDICT CATEGORY OVERLOAD: 'Misleading' conflates 4 distinct failure modes. 23 WINs under one label implies systematic dishonesty but many are simply non-discriminating. Consider subcategory 'Non-Discriminating' or move to 'Std Model Explains'.
